hypothesis: A capped ExECT S2 smoke on Qwen3.6:35b tests whether frozen v1.3 five-family label policy produces valid JSON and scorer-compatible outputs before local cap-25 and full validation.
metric_caveats: This capped smoke run validates the ExECT S2 field-family program contract on Qwen3.6:35b only; it is not a performance estimate.
These are partial ExECT S2 diagnostics (five families), not published ExECTv2 Table 1 reproduction.
This config intentionally avoids ChainOfThought, BootstrapFewShot, and GEPA per docs/policies/qwen_dspy_latency_policy.md.
Do not compare this run to GPT 4.1-mini metrics as the same experiment.
Record local Ollama GPU residency or RAM offload when inspecting artifacts.
Evidence quote support should be reported separately from field-family precision, recall, and F1.
